content.situation: 游客在著名地标前想请导游帮忙拍一张个人照，希望照片能包含背景景观
content.speakerText: This landmark is amazing! Could you ___ me with the background?
content.speakerTextCn: 这个地标太棒了！你能帮我拍一张有背景的照片吗？
content.responseTemplate: Sure! Just stand here—I'll make sure ___ is in the frame.
content.hint: 表达‘帮我拍照’常用 take a photo of，‘背景’在旅游场景中通常是地标或风景
content.knowledgePoint: 请求拍照的标准表达结构

content.situation: 一群游客想请导游帮忙拍合照，但不确定导游是否熟悉手机功能
content.speakerText: We'd love a group shot—___ if you're comfortable with it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们想要一张合照——如果你觉得方便的话，可以帮忙吗？
content.responseTemplate: Of course! I'll ___ the timer so everyone is in the picture.
content.hint: 委婉请求用 would you mind，‘使用定时器’固定搭配是 use the timer
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌请求与功能动词搭配

content.situation: 游客希望导游帮忙拍照，但自己拿着相机，想请对方帮忙按快门
content.speakerText: I've got the camera—___ press the shutter when I wave?
content.speakerTextCn: 我拿着相机——我挥手时你能按快门吗？
content.responseTemplate: No problem! I'll ___ as soon as you wave.
content.hint: 请求他人操作设备用 could you，‘按快门’最自然表达是 press the shutter 或 press it
content.knowledgePoint: 操作设备的动词搭配与礼貌请求
